title: Only defined names should be listed in all
description: Ensures that names listed in the __all__ module attribute are actually defined in the module.
message: Found a name in __all__ that is not defined in the module.
recommendation: Ensure all names in __all__ are defined in the module.

noncompliant.description: Module with an undefined name in __all__

compliant.description: Module with only defined names in __all__

why_is_this_an_issue: It causes confusion and makes it difficult to understand the actual functions and variables available in the module.
how_to_fix: Remove any names from __all__ that are not defined in the module.
function_code:
def get_defined_names(file_dict):
    # Implementation of function to find defined names in the current file.

metadata.title: Only defined names should be listed in all
